subject: Gaming
title: Feedback Loops and Juice
description: One-minute skill: Feedback Loops and Juice.

hook.text: That satisfying 'ding' when you level up isn't random. It's engineered to hit your brain's reward center.

buildup.text: Game designers call it 'juice'—the visual and audio feedback that makes simple actions feel amazing.

discovery.text: Screen shakes, particle effects, and sound cues all amplify the feeling of impact and achievement.

twist.text: Mobile games are the juiciest. Every tap explodes with color and sound to keep you tapping.

climax.text: Juice makes boring actions feel exciting. Without it, even good games feel lifeless and flat.

punchline.text: That satisfying ding? Engineered dopamine. Juice makes games addictive.

quiz.question: What is 'juice' in game design?
options: Visual and audio feedback that makes simple actions feel satisfying
